classificationDecisions.rationale: Reason codes: FUNCTIONAL_BACKGROUND_MISMATCH, MANUAL_CODING_REQUIRED Evidence: "Build your game. As the creative lead and primary builder on a brand-new title, you’ll ship a complete, commercially viable game..." , "AI is your force multiplier."
classificationDecisions.rawResponse:
NO
REASON_CODES: FUNCTIONAL_BACKGROUND_MISMATCH, MANUAL_CODING_REQUIRED
EVIDENCE: "Build your game. As the creative lead and primary builder on a brand-new title, you’ll ship a complete, commercially viable game..." , "AI is your force multiplier." 

**Reasoning:**

The job description requires someone to "ship a complete, commercially viable game," implying full development ownership. The candidate profile explicitly states they "Builds software only with AI assistance; cannot do independent manual coding without AI." This directly violates a hard-fail rule (Rule 5). Additionally, the role requires a "creative lead and primary builder" which suggests a level of independent software development capability beyond AI assistance. The candidate lacks a proven track record in full game development or independent coding, triggering FUNCTIONAL_BACKGROUND_MISMATCH. The reliance on AI as a "force multiplier" doesn't negate the need for underlying coding skills.
